title: Jedi expeditionary suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Jedi expeditionary suits''' were a type of standard [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that was worn by members of the [[New Jedi Order]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

One was worn by [[Danni Quee]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
